name: Sequential Thinking
description: Dynamic and reflective problem-solving through thought sequences

tools.name: sequentialthinking
tools.description: A tool for dynamic and reflective problem-solving through sequential thinking steps with the ability to revise and branch

nextThoughtNeeded.description: Whether another thought step is needed

thoughtNumber.description: Current thought number in the sequence

totalThoughts.description: Estimated total number of thoughts needed

isRevision.description: Whether this revises a previous thought

needsMoreThoughts.description: Whether more thoughts are needed beyond the estimate
